findings.evidence: `rg -n "instance homZero|instance homAdd|instance homAddCommMonoid" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean` shows undocumented instances at lines 85, 88, and 91.
findings.fix: Add docstrings describing the zero, addition, and additive-commutative-monoid structures on categorical morphisms.
findings.issue: The exported category hom-set instances `homZero`, `homAdd`, and `homAddCommMonoid` have no docstrings, even though they expose the new additive hom-set structure through `ComoduleCat`.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem (zero_toLinearMap|add_toLinearMap|smul_toLinearMap|nsmul_toLinearMap|sum_toLinearMap)" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Hom.lean` shows public undocumented theorems at lines 62, 66, 71, 145, and 160.
findings.fix: Add docstrings to `zero_toLinearMap`, `add_toLinearMap`, `smul_toLinearMap`, `nsmul_toLinearMap`, and `sum_toLinearMap`, matching the existing documented `*_apply` lemmas.
findings.issue: The public simp lemmas transferring zero/addition/scalar multiplication/natural-number scalar multiplication/sums to underlying linear maps are undocumented.

summary: The new module docstring and central `Comodule.Hom` instances are documented, but several exported additive hom-set API declarations are still undocumented.
